network.scope: Loopback-only CDP connections to an operator-selected 127.0.0.1 port. No outbound internet is allowed by bundled scripts.
network.reason: Live theme injection and verification require a local DevTools connection while the signed app bundle remains untouched.

target_enforcement.openai: Skill instructions plus injector host validation
target_enforcement.claude: Skill instructions plus injector host validation
target_enforcement.generic: Skill instructions plus injector host validation

file_write.scope: Prepared theme directories, ~/.codex/codex-theme-studio, owner-only recovery state under ~/Library/Application Support/CodexThemeStudio, and an opt-in user LaunchAgent plist under ~/Library/LaunchAgents.
file_write.reason: Self-contained assets, atomic deployment, logs, immutable backups, and explicitly authorized restart persistence are required for reproducible installation and recovery.

target_enforcement.openai: Explicit install command and path allowlist
target_enforcement.claude: Explicit install command and path allowlist
target_enforcement.generic: Explicit install command and path allowlist

subprocess.scope: Local Node.js and shell validation, macOS app identity checks, managed injector launch, optional Codex restart, opt-in user LaunchAgent registration, and restore commands.
subprocess.reason: The runtime must validate the official app, launch a loopback-managed process, and perform deterministic verification; one-time and recurring restart permissions remain explicit user-authorization gates.

target_enforcement.openai: Explicit restart and resident-manager authorization in SKILL.md
target_enforcement.claude: Explicit restart and resident-manager authorization in SKILL.md
target_enforcement.generic: Explicit restart and resident-manager authorization in SKILL.md
